<!-- AI Cold Call Agent Client Interface Project -->

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Full-stack web application for AI Cold Call Agent
- **Frontend**: HTML/CSS/JavaScript with Google Sheets integration
- **Backend**: Node.js/Express
- **Purpose**: Client interface for managing leads and triggering AI cold call workflows
- **Features**: Google Sheets editing, workflow trigger button, real-time status updates

## Progress Tracking

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type: Node.js web application with Google Sheets integration

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created complete project structure with Node.js backend, HTML/CSS/JS frontend, Google Sheets integration, and n8n workflow trigger

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented Google Sheets integration, n8n workflow trigger, responsive UI, and real-time status updates

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed for this project

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed successfully, no compilation errors

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Development server started successfully on http://localhost:3000

- [x] Launch the Project
	Project is running and accessible via web browser

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with comprehensive setup and usage instructions
